behaviors.behavior: LIGHT_PALETTE + DARK_PALETTE clear WCAG-AA/AA-large per slot
behaviors.evidence: terminal-theme.test.ts 46 cases PASSED (fg/bg >= AA; each swept ANSI slot >= AA-large on the palette bg; light excludes brightWhite, dark excludes black)

behaviors.behavior: paletteFor selects the correct palette; EMBEDDED_TERMINAL_PALETTE alias still = DARK

behaviors.evidence: terminalAppearance.test.ts PASSED (incl. auto->OS for Claude 'auto', custom/unknown->dark)

behaviors.behavior: spawn-env default truecolor (TERM=xterm-256color, COLORTERM=truecolor, no FORCE_COLOR); inherited FORCE_COLOR stripped; LEGACY opt-out restores clamp; NO_FLICKER + session-marker strip unchanged
claude-theme-reader parses/trims theme, returns null on missing/malformed/non-string/empty
applyAppearance sets a fresh ITheme (light #ffffff / dark #1a1a1a) + refresh; swallows refresh throw; resolveAppearanceNow reads prefs+cache
Settings Appearance selector defaults auto, reflects persisted value, persists + emits same-tab change event, offers 4 options
Open terminal re-themes LIVE to light with no remount; fresh mount picks up persisted Light

behaviors.behavior: Actual light-mode readability with real Claude themes + PowerShell PSReadLine prompt flicker under TERM=xterm-256color
behaviors.evidence: Visual/flicker verification is user-UAT per ADR-098 precedent for this terminal-rendering class; node-pty (native) unavailable in the junctioned worktree for a byte-capture. Instant revert via SHIPWRIGHT_TERMINAL_LEGACY_BRAND_COLORS=1.
